title: A family conversation
objective: Mantener una conversación completa sobre familiares, relaciones, edades, lugares y gustos.

activities.feedback_correct: El hermano de tu padre es tu tío.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra para el hermano de uno de tus padres.

activities.feedback_correct: Cousins es plural y usa live.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con un sujeto plural usa la forma base del verbo.

activities.prompt: My aunt ___ cooking, but she ___ like shopping.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos likes y doesn't like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona singular en afirmación y negación.

activities.feedback_correct: La oración usa sujeto, verbo, lugar y preposición correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca My cousin al principio y lives antes de in Madrid.

activities.instruction: Une cada pregunta con la respuesta adecuada.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes obtener distintos datos sobre un familiar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la pregunta pide persona, lugar, gusto o edad.

activities.prompt: A: Tell me about your sister. B: Her name is Julia. She is twenty-four and lives in Lima. She works at a school and likes dancing.
activities.question: Where does Julia work?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la información después de lives in Lima.

activities.prompt: This is my cousin. Her name is Ana. She lives in Bogotá and likes music. She is very friendly.
activities.feedback_correct: La descripción es clara y natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica her y la s final de lives y likes.

activities.prompt: The Rivera family is large. Carlos and Elena are married and have two children, Pablo and Sara. Pablo is twelve and likes soccer. Sara is nine and likes drawing. Their grandmother lives with them.
activities.question: Who lives with the family?
activities.feedback_correct: La última oración identifica a la persona que vive con ellos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con lives with them.

activities.prompt: Write a short family profile with ten sentences. Include relationships, names, ages, places, occupations or studies, and likes.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu perfil comunica una imagen completa de una familia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa los verbos con he/she y los posesivos antes de cada familiar.

activities.prompt: The AI is a new friend. Answer questions about your family, describe two relatives, compare their interests, and ask about the AI's fictional family.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes conversar sobre familia y relaciones con información suficiente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta sus preguntas y refuerza las estructuras que todavía confundes.
